calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Typ Restaurant Group, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Williams, Esq. 510-847-2356 for Plaintiff.
Hany Fangary, Esq. 213-623-3822 of Fangary Law Group for Defendant TY Restaurant through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Typ Restaurant Group, Inc.

Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation's motion to approve settlement and for entry of consent judgment as to defendant TYP Restaurant Group, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Nowhere Partners Corp.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Williams, Esq. 510-847-2356 for Plaintiff.
Robert Nicksin, Esq. 213-430-6000 of O'Melveny & Myers LLP for Defendant GT's Living Foods LLC throough Court Call.
Hany Fangary, Esq. 310-995-7975 of Fangary Law Group for Defendant TYP Restaurant Group through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. Defendant's have no objections. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Nowhere Partners Corp.

GRANT. No opposition filed and good cause is shown per the Health & Safety Code. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
